metadata.title: Denveler — launch your product with the community
metadata.description: The community-powered launch platform: post your project, get honest votes and real feedback, and gain visibility.

footer.tagline: Where communities back real products. Honest votes, useful feedback, and visibility from day one.
footer.copyright: Made with love, by and for the community. © {year} Denveler.

common.demoBanner: Demo data — the API isn't available (did you start the database?)
common.removeUpvoteLabel: Remove your upvote from this product ({count} votes)
common.upvoteFailed: We couldn't save your vote — is the API available?

notFound.title: This page launched into the void
notFound.description: The link doesn't exist or the content is no longer available. Let's get you back to something with traction.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty: Nothing here yet. When someone votes or comments on your launches, you'll see it here. 🔔
notifications.mentioned: mentioned you in a comment on

hero.badge: Powered by real people, not algorithms
hero.subtitle: Post your product, get honest votes, useful feedback, and real traction from day one.
hero.trendingBlurb: Organize your time and focus your energy on what matters.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: Introduce your product, explain the problem it solves, and share it with the community.
howItWorks.step2Body: The community discovers your product, votes on it, and leaves useful comments.
howItWorks.step3Body: The best launches climb the leaderboard and reach more makers.

extensionBanner.title: Celebrate your Skool community's achievements
extensionBanner.body: Discover public achievement posts, open them faster, and show real support straight from Denveler. No automation, no bots, no broken rules.
extensionBanner.mockPanelSubtitle: Support your community, with your permission

cta.creatorBody: Publish your project, grow with the community, and get feedback that helps you build the best version of it.
cta.memberBody: Discover amazing projects, vote for the ones you like, and help them grow from the start.

login.title: Welcome back 👋
login.subtitle: Log in to vote, comment, and launch your products.
login.errorInvalid: Wrong email or password. Check and try again.

signup.title: Join the community
signup.subtitle: Launch your projects, support other makers, and gain visibility.
signup.name: Name
signup.nameHint: This is how the community will see you.
signup.passwordHint: Minimum 8 characters. We reject passwords found in known breaches.
signup.terms: By creating your account you agree to participate respectfully: the community is actively moderated.
signup.errorGeneric: We couldn't create your account. Please try again.

about.metaDescription: Denveler is the platform where new products are born and creators connect. Operated by Studio Monk OÜ.

rules.metaDescription: The rules that keep Denveler useful, honest, and human.

privacy.metaDescription: What data Denveler collects, what it's used for, and what control you have over it.

terms.metaDescription: Denveler's rules of use, clear and with no fine print.

contact.metaDescription: Write to us: questions, feedback, press, or anything about Denveler.
contact.title: Contact
contact.intro1: Questions, feedback, press, or an idea to improve Denveler? Write to us and we'll reply to the email you leave. If it's about a specific product or comment, you can also use the
contact.directBody: Prefer to write to us directly? The team behind Denveler:

form.name: Your name
form.emailPlaceholder: so we can reply to you
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help…
form.success: Message sent! We'll reply to the email you left, usually within 1–2 business days.
form.errorTooShort: Tell us a bit more (minimum 10 characters).

launches.metaDescription: Discover the products the community is launching today: vote, comment, and support their makers.
launches.subheading: {date} — vote and comment to give the community's makers visibility.
launches.emptyDescription: Big days start empty. Check past launches or publish yours.

productFeed.noResultsHint: Try different words or clear the filters.
productFeed.defaultEmptyDescription: Be the first to publish your product and kick off the feed.

offerCard.mrrDisclaimer: Metric declared by the maker. Denveler doesn't verify it or take part in the negotiation.
offerCard.requestSent: Request sent. The maker will decide whether to share their contact info.
offerCard.dialogDescription: Tell the maker who you are and why you're interested. If they accept, you'll receive their email.
offerCard.messagePlaceholder: E.g.: I run a micro-SaaS, I'd like to learn more about the product and discuss a possible acquisition…
offerCard.mrrDisclaimerVerified: A Denveler admin confirmed this figure with evidence.

report.dialogDescription: Tell us what's wrong. The moderation team will review it.
report.thanks: Thanks for letting us know. Your report is in the moderation queue.
report.reasonPlaceholder: E.g.: misleading content, spam, broken link…

detail.notFoundDescription: The link may be broken, or the product may no longer be public.

comments.title: Comments
comments.placeholder: Leave constructive feedback, a question, or congratulations…
comments.joinConversation: Join the conversation: community feedback is the heart of every launch.
comments.empty: No one has commented yet. Break the ice! 💬

og.siteTitle: Launch your product with the community
og.siteSubtitle: Post your project, get real votes and feedback, and gain visibility.

leaderboard.metaDescription: Who contributes most to the community: launches, votes received, and feedback given.
leaderboard.title: Community leaderboard
leaderboard.description: We recognize the people who build and support: launching earns 10, each vote received earns 2, and each comment made earns 1.
leaderboard.emptyTitle: The leaderboard is waiting for its first star
leaderboard.emptyDescription: Publish a launch or support other makers to show up here.
leaderboard.ctaBody: Launch your next project or leave feedback for other makers — the community notices.

help.metaDescription: Quick answers to the most common questions about Denveler.

guides.metaDescription: How to run a great launch on Denveler, step by step.
guides.pageTitle: Guide: a great launch on Denveler

news.metaDescription: What's new on Denveler: changes, improvements, and platform releases.

makerProfile.notFoundDescription: The link may be broken, or the account may no longer exist.
makerProfile.noPublicLaunchesDescription: When they publish something, you'll see it here.

popupMock.panelSubtitle: Support your community, with your permission
popupMock.sentBody: A moderator will verify it before it's published.
popupMock.detectedPost: Post detected on the active tab:
popupMock.onlyOnClick: Only sent when you click. Nothing automatic.
popupMock.previewNote: Preview · the real extension installs from the browser

wall.emptyDescription: When the community submits achievements and a moderator verifies them, they'll appear here.
wall.supportNote: Supporting an achievement is always your click on the original post. Denveler never interacts on your behalf.

page.metaDescription: Discover and manually support your Skool community's achievements. Designed with explicit consent: it never votes on its own, never scrapes.
page.heroBody1: The Achievements extension helps you discover your Skool community's achievement posts and support them in a
page.heroBody2: way. It's a tool for giving visibility to the people building things — not a bot.
page.consentFirstBody: every action needs a click from you. The extension never votes, never automates, and never touches private data.
page.howItWorksSubtitle: You're in control at every step. Literally.
page.step1Body: Navigate to a public post in your Skool community, as usual.
page.step2Body: Click the extension and hit “Send”. The title comes pre-filled and editable.
page.step3Body: A moderator confirms it's real and it appears on the community's Achievements wall.
page.neverTitle: What the extension will never do
page.neverSubtitle: These restrictions are deliberate and built into the design, not buried in fine print.
page.never4: Act without an explicit click from you
page.always1: Ask for your manual action on everything
page.always3: Use your own session on the site
page.always4: Show the status of every submission
page.privacyByDesignBody: The extension uses your same Denveler session (no separate tokens) and only sends the title and public URL you choose to share. It doesn't read private messages, doesn't store Skool cookies, and doesn't send anything without your click.
page.wallSubtitle: Achievements the community submitted and a moderator verified. Click to support them on the original post.

collaborations.metaDescription: Connect with someone who needs a service or someone who can provide it.
collaborations.heading: Collaborations
collaborations.subheading: Connect with someone who needs a service or someone who can provide it.
collaborations.emptyDescription: Be the first to post a listing.
collaborations.createDialogDescription: Tell us what you need or what you can offer. It can't be edited after publishing.
collaborations.fieldTitlePlaceholder: E.g.: I need to automate customer support
collaborations.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Share the details: what you need, which tools, budget if applicable…
collaborations.requestSent: Request sent. The author will decide whether to share their contact info.
collaborations.contactDialogDescription: Tell the author who you are and why you're interested. If they accept, you'll receive their email.
collaborations.messagePlaceholder: E.g.: I saw your listing and I'm interested in talking, I have experience in…
collaborations.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this listing? This can't be undone.
collaborations.notFoundDescription: The author may have deleted it, or it may have expired.
collaborations.noneYet: You haven't published any collaborations yet.
